stemHtml: To calculate the Centre of Gravity of a large aircraft, the practical use of the Index Method is to...

options.a: reduce the size of the moment values and to simplify calculations.
options.b: simplify the calculations by taking standard masses for passengers and cargo.
options.c: determine the CG by using an index table covering ranges of passengers (e.g. groups of 10) instead of individual counts.
options.d: visually indicate the CG on a CG limit chart WITHOUT using calculations.
